scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki, Akai Haato, Natsuiro Matsuri, and Aki Rosenthal perform the final chorus of 'Cyber Pure Heart Grand Declaration'.
The first group poses to audience applause and leaves the stage. Tokino Sora, Sakura Miko, Roboco-san, and AZKi enter and prepare for the next song.
Tokino Sora, Sakura Miko, Roboco-san, and AZKi perform 'Shiny Smily Story'.

subtitles.original: コリコリコリコリ...
subtitles.english: Kori-kori-kori-kori...

subtitles.original: 私のため日々お仕事励んでくれてありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for working hard every day for my sake

subtitles.original: 推しも推しも愛おしい
subtitles.english: Both my oshi and your oshi are so precious

subtitles.original: 絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対いっぱい
subtitles.english: Absolutely, absolutely, absolutely, absolutely, so many times

subtitles.original: お願いね
subtitles.english: Please, okay?

subtitles.original: このこのこのこの
subtitles.english: This girl, this girl, this girl, this girl

subtitles.original: うー、このこのこのこの
subtitles.english: Ooh, this girl, this girl, this girl, this girl

subtitles.original: このこのこのこのこのー！
subtitles.english: This girl, this girl, this girl, this girl, this girl!

subtitles.original: 銀河の果てまで推してほしい
subtitles.english: I want you to support me to the ends of the galaxy

subtitles.original: 同じ未来を見ていたい あの夢手にしたい
subtitles.english: I want to see the same future, I want to grasp that dream

subtitles.original: それぞれ違った 心で走れよ
subtitles.english: Run forward with our individual hearts!

subtitles.original: どこを見ても真っ暗な場所に芽生えてた
subtitles.english: It sprouted in a place where everything was pitch black

subtitles.original: ほんの小さな希望に この瞳奪われた
subtitles.english: My eyes were captivated by a tiny glimmer of hope

subtitles.original: 不安で揺れる心を上手くチューニングして
subtitles.english: Successfully tuning my heart that wavered with anxiety

subtitles.original: ほんの小さな勇気を 握りしめていたよ
subtitles.english: I was clutching onto a tiny bit of courage

subtitles.original: 諦めの文字 手放して進む
subtitles.english: Letting go of the word "surrender" and moving forward

subtitles.original: 苦しい時も もう私は一人じゃないから
subtitles.english: Because even in painful times, I'm not alone anymore

subtitles.original: だからこそ夢追いかけたい ワクワク止まらない
subtitles.english: That's why I want to chase my dreams, the excitement won't stop

subtitles.original: 想像を超えてく 世界見せてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll show you a world that exceeds your imagination

subtitles.original: アクセスしてみてみたい 後悔なんてそうさせない
subtitles.english: I want to try accessing it, I won't let you have any regrets

subtitles.original: それぞれ違った 心で走れよ
subtitles.english: Run forward with our individual hearts!

subtitles.original: 夜空に輝く眩しい思いは
subtitles.english: The dazzling feelings shining in the night sky

subtitles.original: 見たこともない光を リアルに届けるよ
subtitles.english: Will deliver a light you've never seen before to reality

subtitles.original: いつも聞こえるエールをここにキャプチャーして
subtitles.english: Capturing the cheers I always hear right here

subtitles.original: また新しい光を 探したくなるよ
subtitles.english: It makes me want to look for a new light again

subtitles.original: 君の笑顔は 誇らしく進む
subtitles.english: Your smile moves forward proudly

subtitles.original: 悲しい時に 見返すよ力湧くから
subtitles.english: When I'm sad, I'll look back at it, because it gives me strength

subtitles.original: 胸を張って夢追いかけたい 奇跡のストーリー
subtitles.english: I want to puff out my chest and chase my dreams, a miraculous story

subtitles.original: 一緒に作ろう 終わらない夢を
subtitles.english: Let's create an endless dream together

subtitles.original: 誰一人欠かせない 相まったこの世界
subtitles.english: In this world where everyone is indispensable and intertwined

subtitles.original: それぞれ違った 心で彩れ
subtitles.english: Color it with our individual hearts!

subtitles.original: 悲しい時も
subtitles.english: Even when it's sad

subtitles.original: 寂しい時も
subtitles.english: Even when it's lonely

subtitles.original: 信じ合えるものがある
subtitles.english: There's something we can believe in together

subtitles.original: 密かにこの鼓動 鳴らし続けたい
subtitles.english: Deep down, I want to keep this heartbeat sounding

subtitles.original: モノクロの世界に 溢れ出すよ笑顔たち
subtitles.english: Smiles will overflow into this monochrome world

subtitles.original: 憧れの舞台立ちたい まぶしく輝きたい
subtitles.english: I want to stand on the stage I've longed for, I want to shine dazzlingly

subtitles.original: 時になみだして また笑い合いたい
subtitles.english: Sometimes we'll cry, but I want us to laugh together again

subtitles.original: 同じ未来を見ていたい あの夢手にしたい
subtitles.english: I want to see the same future, I want to grasp that dream

subtitles.original: 踏み出そう 奇跡の一歩を
subtitles.english: Let's take a step, a miraculous step

subtitles.original: 息切らして夢追いかけたい ワクワク止まらない
subtitles.english: Running out of breath, I want to chase my dreams, the excitement won't stop

subtitles.original: 想像を超えてく 世界見せてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll show you a world that exceeds your imagination

subtitles.original: アクセスしてみてみない？ 後悔なんてここにはない
subtitles.english: Won't you try accessing it? There are no regrets here

subtitles.original: それぞれ違った 心で作るよ
subtitles.english: We'll create it with our individual hearts!
